query:
UPDATE inventory i
INNER JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
INNER JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
SET i.locationZone = COALESCE(wl.zoneCode, wz.code)
WHERE i.locationZone IS NULL;

INNER JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
